meta.week_number_logic: week_number is determined by counting full weeks since system_start_date (2026-03-16). week_number = ((floor(days_since_start / 7)) % 2 == 0) ? 1 : 2. So weeks 0,2,4... from start = Week 1; weeks 1,3,5... = Week 2. The first 7 days (Mar 16-22) = Week 1.

items.label: Pre-workout snack
items.notes: Coffee #1 (132 cal) + 1 fruit (100 cal) = 232 cal. Fruit is food_choice:pre_workout_fruits.
